content_body:
We own a second home on the banks of the Toccoa River in Mineral Bluff, Ga.  The premier builder of the area (Keith Sumner) built our home to embody our sentiments and dreams.  

With those sentiments in mind,  we thought long and hard before deciding to place our house on a rental program.  We eventually made the decision to go with Cabin Rentals of Georgia.  The owner, Gary Knight and his wife Lissa are very passionate about their business.  The care they take of our property reflects  this.

And now on to “Team Excellence”….Gary has built a front office team that is extremely proficient and courteous.  Tressa, Nicole, and Haley work effectively to ensure that the needs of both the customer and we the owners are met.  They do this with such a cheerful attitude.  The house is cleaned very thoroughly reflecting the quality of the cleaning staff and the due-diligence of the management team.  

Revenue has exceeded our expectations and continues to grow.  CRG obviously has the right formula for success.

In summary,  Gary and his team have found that fine balance between providing first class service to their customers while ensuring the interest of the home owners are protected.

Respectfully yours,
Terry and Gloria
“A River of Dreams”
title: Management Team Excels
